package rulecoverage

func PositiveInitRegistersRoutesOrDependencies() string {
    ruleID := "init_registers_routes_or_dependencies"
    family := "architecture"
    severity := "warning"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "`init()` functions that register handlers, routes, or runtime dependencies."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
